stemHtml: The identification of Prohibited (P), Restricted (R) and Danger (D) areas shall be composed of the...

options.a: letters (P), (R) or (D) for the area concerned followed by identification figures.
options.b: State or territory location indicator, followed by the letters (P), (R) or (D), followed by identification figures.
options.c: State or territory location indicator, followed by the letters (P), (R) and (D).
options.d: letters (P), (R) and (D), followed by identification figures.
